zh.Moreton Say, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 賽
zh.Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾其其
zh.Whixall, Shropshire Unitary authority, S: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford於大約1256年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾其其時，他的父親Ralph de Sandford58歲，母親Alice De Whixhall18歲。他於1280年與Agnes de Saye在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 賽結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1327年享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford于大约1256年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾其其时，他的父亲Ralph de Sandford58岁，母亲Alice De Whixhall18岁。他于1280年与Agnes de Saye在英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 賽结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1327年享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sanford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sandford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford was born about 1256, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Sandford, was 58 and his mother, Alice De Whixhall, was 18. He married Agnes de Saye in 1280, in Moreton Say, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1327, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford est né environ 1256, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Sandford, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Alice De Whixhall, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Saye en 1280, à Moreton Say, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1327, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford um 1256 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Sandford 58 und seine Mutter Alice De Whixhall 18. Er hat 1280 in Moreton Say, Shropshire, England Agnes de Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1327 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford è nato il circa 1256 nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Sandford, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Alice De Whixhall, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Saye nel 1280, nel Moreton Say, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1327, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord of Sandford Richard Sanfordが約1256年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチで生まれた時，父Ralph de Sandfordは58歳，母Alice De Whixhallは18歳であった。1280年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン サイでAgnes de Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1327年に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford(이)가 대략 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Sandford(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Whixhall(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1280년 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 지에서 Agnes de Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1327년 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford nasceu aproximadamente 1256, em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Sandford, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Whixhall, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Saye em 1280, em Moreton Say, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1327, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford родился около 1256 г. в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Sandford было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Whixhall, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Saye в 1280 г. в местности моретон сеи, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1327 г. в возрасте 73 лет.
